Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Canadian Multiculturalism Act (non-application in Quebec)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Canadian Multiculturalism Act (non-application in Quebec)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Canadian Multiculturalism Act to provide that it does not apply in Quebec.

Whereas Quebecers form a nation and therefore possess all the tools needed to define their identity and protect their common values, including as regards the protection of the French language, the separation of church and state and gender equality;
Now, therefore, Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The Canadian Multiculturalism Act is amended by adding the following after section 2:
This Act does not apply in Quebec.
